repo.description: A mocking and stubbing library for Ruby

terms.context_snippet: * A Ruby library for [mocking](http://xunitpatterns.com/Mock%20Object.html) and [stubbing](http://xunitpatterns.com/Test%20Stub.html) - but deliberately not (yet) [faking](http://xunitpatterns.com/Fake%20Object.html) or [spying](http://xunitpatterns.com/Test%20Spy.html).
